events.event_description: U.S. ambassadorial relations with Dominica established when the first Ambassador, Sally Angela Shelton (resident in Bridgetown, Barbados), presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Sally Angela Shelton, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1979-05-17. Credentials presented: 1979-07-18. Left Bridgetown 1981-02-14. Note: Also Special Representative to Antigua, St. Christopher-Nevis-Anguilla, and St. Vincent.
